name: bangumi
description: Enjoy ACG with Bangumi - search, browse collections, and check daily broadcasts

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Bangumi
commands.description: Search subjects on Bangumi by keyword
commands.subtitle: Bangumi

commands.name: calendar
commands.title: Daily Broadcast
commands.description: View this week's daily broadcast schedule
commands.subtitle: Bangumi

preferences.name: accessToken
preferences.title: Access Token
preferences.description: Bangumi API access token. Get one at https://next.bgm.tv/demo/access-token

preferences.name: username
preferences.title: Username
preferences.description: Your Bangumi username (used for collections API)

author: Flartiny
